title: Simply Chair and Tables
description: A simple furniture oriented modpacks with tons of new decoration and storage.
body:
# Simply Chair and Tables

A charming and lightweight **furniture-focused** modpack designed for *Minecraft 1.21.5*.  
Bring warmth and style to your builds with **plenty of decorative blocks, chairs, tables, and creative storage solutions**.

Whether you're designing a cozy cottage, a modern living room, or an outdoor café, this modpack provides all the tools you need to make your spaces feel alive.

## Features
- 🪑 **Stylish Chairs & Tables** – Multiple designs to fit any build style.
- 🏠 **Enhanced Decoration** – Add personality and charm to your interiors and exteriors.
- 📦 **Expanded Storage Options** – Keep your builds organized without sacrificing style.
- 🌿 **Perfect for Builders** – Minimal performance impact, maximum creative potential.

## Why You'll Love It
If you enjoy **furnishing, decorating, and customizing** your Minecraft world without overwhelming complexity, this modpack is a perfect fit.
